title: U.S. and Iran Talks Appear on Track to Resume Despite Mixed Messages
summary_full: With the two-week cease-fire almost over, Vice President JD Vance was expected to head to Pakistan on Tuesday for the second round of negotiations.
summary_public: With the two-week cease-fire almost over, Vice President JD Vance was expected to head to Pakistan on Tuesday for the second round of negotiations.
